instruction: Recolor ONLY the icon between heart and star (the bell) blue (#3b82f6). Every other icon stays #222.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 336 80" width="336" height="80">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="336" height="80" fill="white" />
  <g id="heart" data-source="heroicons/outline/heart.svg" transform="translate(16, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12Z"/></g>
  <g id="bell" data-source="heroicons/outline/bell.svg" transform="translate(80, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.857 17.082a23.848 23.848 0 0 0 5.454-1.31A8.967 8.967 0 0 1 18 9.75V9A6 6 0 0 0 6 9v.75a8.967 8.967 0 0 1-2.312 6.022c1.733.64 3.56 1.085 5.455 1.31m5.714 0a24.255 24.255 0 0 1-5.714 0m5.714 0a3 3 0 1 1-5.714 0"/></g>
  <g id="star" data-source="heroicons/outline/star.svg" transform="translate(144, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M11.48 3.499a.562.562 0 0 1 1.04 0l2.125 5.111a.563.563 0 0 0 .475.345l5.518.442c.499.04.701.663.321.988l-4.204 3.602a.563.563 0 0 0-.182.557l1.285 5.385a.562.562 0 0 1-.84.61l-4.725-2.885a.562.562 0 0 0-.586 0L6.982 20.54a.562.562 0 0 1-.84-.61l1.285-5.386a.562.562 0 0 0-.182-.557l-4.204-3.602a.562.562 0 0 1 .321-.988l5.518-.442a.563.563 0 0 0 .475-.345L11.48 3.5Z"/></g>
  <g id="moon" data-source="heroicons/outline/moon.svg" transform="translate(208, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21.752 15.002A9.72 9.72 0 0 1 18 15.75c-5.385 0-9.75-4.365-9.75-9.75 0-1.33.266-2.597.748-3.752A9.753 9.753 0 0 0 3 11.25C3 16.635 7.365 21 12.75 21a9.753 9.753 0 0 0 9.002-5.998Z"/></g>
  <g id="sun" data-source="heroicons/outline/sun.svg" transform="translate(272, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 3v2.25m6.364.386-1.591 1.591M21 12h-2.25m-.386 6.364-1.591-1.591M12 18.75V21m-4.773-4.227-1.591 1.591M5.25 12H3m4.227-4.773L5.636 5.636M15.75 12a3.75 3.75 0 1 1-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 0 1 7.5 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
